alternateName: 1500 postings | 25 AI roles | salaries, skills & demand

distribution.name: archive.zip
distribution.description: Archive containing all the contents of the AI Jobs Market 2025-2026 | Salaries dataset

distribution.name: ai_jobs_market_2025_2026.csv
distribution.description:
1,500 AI and ML job postings from 2025-2026 across 25 roles
and 14 countries. Each row represents one job posting with 25
columns covering salary, experience level, education, location,
company size, industry, required skills, remote work type,
market demand score, and derived features. Includes emerging
roles like LLM Engineer, RAG Engineer and AI Agent Developer
not found in older job market datasets.

field.name: job_id
field.description: Unique identifier for each job posting (AIJOB0001 format)

field.name: job_title
field.description: Specific AI or ML role title (25 unique roles)

field.name: job_category
field.description: Broader role category: AI Engineering, Data Science, MLOps, etc.

field.name: experience_level
field.description: Required seniority: Entry / Mid / Senior / Lead

field.name: years_of_experience
field.description: Minimum years of experience required for the role

field.name: education_required
field.description: Minimum education: Bachelor's / Master's / PhD / Bootcamp

field.name: annual_salary_usd
field.description: Annual total compensation in US dollars

field.name: salary_min_usd
field.description: Minimum of the salary range advertised for this role

field.name: salary_max_usd
field.description: Maximum of the salary range advertised for this role

field.name: city
field.description: City where the job is located

field.name: country
field.description: Country of the job posting (14 countries including Global/Remote)

field.name: remote_work
field.description: Work arrangement: On-site / Hybrid / Fully Remote

field.name: company_size
field.description: Size of hiring company: Startup / SME / Mid-size / Enterprise / Big Tech

field.name: industry
field.description: Industry sector of the hiring company

field.name: required_skills
field.description: Pipe-separated list of required technical and soft skills

field.name: ai_salary_premium_pct
field.description: Salary premium percentage compared to equivalent non-AI role

field.name: demand_score
field.description: Market demand score from 0-100 based on hiring volume and growth

field.name: demand_growth_yoy_pct
field.description: Year-over-year percentage growth in demand for this role

field.name: benefits_score_10
field.description: Quality of benefits package rated 0-10

field.name: posting_year
field.description: Year the job was posted: 2025 or 2026

field.name: posting_month
field.description: Month the job was posted (1-12)

field.name: is_senior
field.description: Binary flag: 1 if Senior or Lead level, 0 otherwise

field.name: is_remote_friendly
field.description: Binary flag: 1 if Hybrid or Fully Remote, 0 if On-site only

field.name: is_llm_role
field.description: Binary flag: 1 if role involves LLM or Generative AI work

field.name: salary_tier
field.description: Salary bracket: Entry / Mid / Upper-Mid / Senior / Elite

name: AI Jobs Market 2025-2026 | Salaries
description:
## AI Jobs Market 2025-2026 | Salaries, Skills & Demand

### About This Dataset
A comprehensive dataset of 1,500 AI and machine learning job
postings from 2025-2026, covering 25 roles across 14 countries.
Built for data scientists, ML engineers, students, and career
researchers who want to understand the rapidly evolving AI job
market — salaries, in-demand skills, remote work trends, and
company size breakdowns.

---

### Coverage
- 1,500 job postings (2025-2026)
- 25 distinct AI/ML job roles
- 14 countries: USA, UK, Germany, France, Canada,
  Australia, Singapore, Switzerland, UAE, Japan,
  Netherlands, China, India, Remote/Global
- 12 industries: Technology, Finance, Healthcare,
  Automotive, Retail, Manufacturing and more
- 5 company sizes: Startup to Big Tech (FAANG+)

---

### Column Descriptions

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `job_id` | Unique job posting identifier |
| `job_title` | Specific AI/ML role title |... (truncated for brevity)
